channel.title: Expansion on Crime Empire Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Expansion on Crime Empire Guide

item.title: Map Zones and Key Locations: Complete Area Guide
item.description:
Short answer: The Schedule 1 map has 5 main zones: Downtown, Motel Area, Industrial Zone, Docks, and Highway (Casino). Each zone has different suppliers, police density, and available properties. Downtown and Motel are safe for early game. Industrial and Docks are mid-to-late game zones. The Highway zone has the casino and is most active at night.

Zone-by-Zone Breakdown

Zone Police Density Properties Suppliers Best Time Risk Level
Downtown High (2 patrols + 1 station) Apartment (free) Dan Samwell (shop) Day Medium
Motel/Westville Low (1 patrol) Bungalow ($6K) Albert Hoover Any Low
Industrial Medium (1 patrol) Barn ($25K) Shirley Watts, Fungal Phil Day Medium
Docks Medium (1 night patrol) Docks Warehouse ($50K) Salvador Moreno Night (6PM-6AM) Medium
Highway/North Low (1 patrol) None Casino, vending machines Night Low

Downtown Zone

The starting area. Contains:
